fato_historico: 1982: Two hundred sixty-eight Guatemalan campesinos ("peasants" or "country people") are slain in the Plan de Sánchez massacre.
energia_do_dia: The cosmos invites you to honor the beauty of collective healing. Just as the earth remembers the seeds of those who came before, you may find that today is a perfect moment to plant seeds of peace. It is a good time to reflect on your deep roots and cherish the strength found within your resilient spirit.
frase_do_dia: Your kindness is a powerful light that guides you toward a brighter future.
significado_numero: Representing the infinite flow of cosmic energy and deep inner wisdom.
conselho: Practice mindful gratitude and share your warmth with everyone you encounter today.
